title: Reduce Task Component in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'task/reduce' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains components for the reduce phase. ExceptionReporter.java handles exception reporting across threads. InMemoryWriter.java writes key-value pairs into memory. ShuffleHeader.java provides shuffle data metadata. ShuffleScheduler.java manages shuffle phase, showcasing a modular, well-structured architecture with clear separation of concerns.
